flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Bethany College fell 18% between 2021 and 2024 (65.2% → 53.8%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Bethany College rose 16% between 2021 and 2024 ($31.6k → $36.8k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Bethany College rose 16% between 2021 and 2024 ($31.6k → $36.8k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Bethany College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.0% → 0.0%).
